headline: Does Geopolitics and New Gas Projects Change The Bull Case For Chevron (CVX)?
summary: In recent days, Chevron has been in focus as U.S.-Iran tensions pushed Brent crude above US$90 a barrel, while analysts highlighted the potential for stronger near-term earnings and gas price increases amid ongoing military strikes and supply concerns. At the same time, Chevron has been testing new energy-adjacent avenues such as powering Microsoft’s West Texas AI data center with natural gas turbines and exploring major Iraqi oilfield and export projects that could diversify its operational...

headline: These Dividend Aristocrats Yield Enough to Let Your Passive Income Do the Heavy Lifting
summary: Some dividend streaks survive a rough quarter, but a rare few have held through five decades of recessions, rate spikes, and oil crashes without missing a single raise. These five names show what that kind of durability actually looks like inside a portfolio built to generate passive income.

raw.headline: These Dividend Aristocrats Yield Enough to Let Your Passive Income Do the Heavy Lifting

These five names show what that kind of durability actually looks like inside a portfolio built to generate passive income.

headline: 70 Dividend Aristocrats Face Their Mid-2026 Test: NOBL’s 2% Yield Under Pressure
summary: Seventy companies have raised their dividends through every recession and rate shock for at least a quarter century, but a bruising few quarters for some of NOBL's most-watched names put that unbroken record under real pressure heading into mid-2026.

headline: Oil At $90? Prediction Market Odds Jump, Bringing Energy ETFs Back in Focus

headline: Trump Went to War Convinced Iran Would 'Fold Really Quickly,' New Book Claims. Polymarket Prices a Ground Invasion at 27%
